message:
fix(mobile): Fix bugs in BottomSheet and mobile-ux.css

- Remove unused startScrollTop ref from BottomSheet
- Add handleTouchCancel for edge cases (incoming calls, notifications)
- Reset drag state when BottomSheet closes
- Add missing ptr-spin keyframe for pull-to-refresh spinner
- Remove problematic 'background: inherit' rule on touch devices
